"The clumsy shifter has done it again."

One moment, Dylan was soaring through the air, making a game-saving play. The next, he was body-slamming some poor, unsuspecting soul into the water. As laughter erupted around him and his poor victim gasped for air, Dylan could only think one thing—Well. At least they weren’t dead.
